welcome.system_active: The system is operational. Visual effects are safely managed by HVE.
welcome.system_inactive: System halted. Requires acceptance of the persistence contract to continue.

warning.title: SECURE PERSISTENCE CONTRACT
warning.text: Upon activation, HVE will deploy a guardian shield and inject a secure path into your hyprland.conf. If you uninstall the plugin from the Shell, the system will self-clean on the next reboot without causing Hyprland errors.

features.title: Features & Benefits
features.description: Hyprland Visual Editor is the aesthetic evolution of your desktop.

docs.title: Architecture & Documentation
docs.description: Discover how HVE works under the hood.
docs.summary: Hyprland Visual Editor uses a real-time Fragments and Assembly system. It never touches your main configuration. Everything is safely generated in an isolated overlay.conf master file.

credits.title: Credits
credits.ai_desc: QML Architecture and path debugging assistance by Gemini (Google).

animations.header_subtitle: Select the animation style for your desktop

02_inercia_elastica.title: Elastic Inertia
02_inercia_elastica.desc: Organic movement. Windows gain momentum on exit and bounce on entry.

03_seda_minimalista.title: Minimalist Silk
03_seda_minimalista.desc: Absolute smoothness. No bounces, just perfect macOS-style landings.

04_minimalismo_snappy.title: Snappy Minimalism
04_minimalismo_snappy.desc: Optimized for maximum speed. Window and workspace management only.

05_material_moderno.title: Modern Material
05_material_moderno.desc: Google Pixel aesthetic. Organic animations, subtle scaling, and tactile response.

06_impacto_clasico.title: Classic Impact
06_impacto_clasico.desc: "Jelly" effect. Elastic bounce on entry and anticipation on exit.

07_lineal.title: Linear
07_lineal.desc: Mathematical precision. Constant motion, "Sci-Fi HUD" style.

08_cristal.title: Glass
08_cristal.desc: Ethereal glide. Feeling of glass floating without friction.

09_seda_silk.title: Silk
09_seda_silk.desc: Refined JaKooLit style. Energetic entries, fleeting exits, and stable workspaces.

10_retro_arcade.title: Retro Arcade
10_retro_arcade.desc: "Toon/Arcade" effect. Windows jump and bounce exaggeratedly.

11_futurista.title: Futuristic
11_futurista.desc: Holographic interface. Digital precision, zero bounces, and vertical data flow.

12_rebote.title: Bounce
12_rebote.desc: Vertical spring physics. Windows fall and bounce upon opening.

13_organico.title: Organic
13_organico.desc: "Sprout" movement. Smooth vertical growth and slow fades.

14_elastico.title: Elastic
14_elastico.desc: Rubber band physics. Windows arrive, stretch, and bounce vertically.

15_desvanecido.title: Fade
15_desvanecido.desc: Spectral materialization. Windows appear smoothly with barely any movement.

16_dinamico.title: Dynamic
16_dinamico.desc: Organic rhythm. Combination of speed and smooth settling.

17_sutil.title: Subtle
17_sutil.desc: Zero distractions. Absolute smoothness without bounces or abrupt movements.

18_energico.title: Energetic
18_energico.desc: Maximum visual impact. Exaggerated bounces (56%) and kickback exits.

12_neon_cyberpunk.title: Neon Cyber-Glow (Dual)
12_neon_cyberpunk.desc: Simulation of bicolor brightness using a white/violet light base.

13_the_joker.title: The Joker
13_the_joker.desc: Joker aesthetic: Acid green and deep purple with an electric glow.

settings.path_desc: Absolute path for the satellite configuration file.
